PostToolUse.command: cat /dev/stdin | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); tools=['replace_string_in_file','multi_replace_string_in_file','create_file']; p=d.get('toolInput',{}).get('filePath',''); print(json.dumps({'systemMessage':'Code changed. Run /sync-docs to keep .github/instructions/ up to date.'}) if d.get('toolName') in tools and any(x in p for x in ['trading_bot/','trading_ui/src','llm_training/']) else '{}')"
